motivation_messages.title: You got this 💪
motivation_messages.body: Every rep counts. Show up for yourself today.

motivation_messages.title: Stay consistent
motivation_messages.body: The only bad workout is the one you didn't do.

motivation_messages.title: Level up today
motivation_messages.body: Small progress is still progress. Keep pushing.

motivation_messages.title: Be unstoppable
motivation_messages.body: Champions are made when nobody is watching.

motivation_messages.title: One more day
motivation_messages.body: Your future self will thank you for today's effort.

motivation_messages.title: No excuses
motivation_messages.body: Discipline beats motivation. Let's go.

motivation_messages.title: Keep the streak alive 🔥
motivation_messages.body: You've been crushing it. Don't stop now.

workout_messages.title: Time to train
workout_messages.body: Your workout is waiting. Open Leveld and get after it.

workout_messages.title: Don't skip today
workout_messages.body: Even 20 minutes makes a difference. Let's move.

workout_messages.title: Ready to lift?
workout_messages.body: Tap here to start tracking your workout.

workout_messages.title: Hit the gym 🏋️
workout_messages.body: Your body is ready. Log your session in Leveld.

workout_messages.title: Workout check-in
workout_messages.body: Have you trained yet today? Your streak depends on it.

workout_messages.title: Iron is calling
workout_messages.body: Open Leveld, pick a plan, and crush it.

workout_messages.title: Your move
workout_messages.body: Rest days are earned. If today isn't one — let's go.

social_messages.title: Check in with the crew
social_messages.body: See what your friends have been training. Open Groups.

social_messages.title: Your friends are active
social_messages.body: Someone in your group just logged a workout. Take a look.

social_messages.title: Share your progress
social_messages.body: Post your latest workout and inspire the group.

social_messages.title: Group challenge 🏆
social_messages.body: Check how you stack up on the leaderboard.

social_messages.title: Stay connected
social_messages.body: A quick check-in keeps the motivation flowing. Open Leveld.

social_messages.title: Community gains
social_messages.body: Training together > training alone. See your feed.

social_messages.title: Who's winning?
social_messages.body: Peek at the group leaderboard and claim your spot.

motivation_messages.title: Morning, friend
motivation_messages.body: Take today one small step at a time. Rooting for you.

motivation_messages.title: You're enough
motivation_messages.body: Effort counts, even on quiet days. Be kind to yourself.

motivation_messages.title: Gentle nudge
motivation_messages.body: Progress doesn't have to be loud to be real.

motivation_messages.title: Hydrate, breathe
motivation_messages.body: When you're ready to move, Leveld is here—no rush.

motivation_messages.title: Soft reminder
motivation_messages.body: You don't have to be perfect—just honest with yourself.

motivation_messages.title: Little wins
motivation_messages.body: Showing up matters more than looking impressive.

motivation_messages.title: Today's plot
motivation_messages.body: Maybe it's a training day. Maybe it's rest. Both can be okay.

workout_messages.title: Whenever you're ready
workout_messages.body: A short session still counts. Open Leveld if it feels right.

workout_messages.title: No pressure
workout_messages.body: If you've got energy, your workout is waiting—guilt-free either way.

workout_messages.title: Friendly check-in
workout_messages.body: Moving a little beats not moving at all.

workout_messages.title: Your pace
workout_messages.body: Train in a way that still feels kind to your body.

workout_messages.title: We believe in you
workout_messages.body: Tap in when it feels right—no shame in slow days.

workout_messages.title: Optional session
workout_messages.body: If today's the day, Leveld makes logging simple.

workout_messages.title: Easy does it
workout_messages.body: Pick something doable and call it a win.

social_messages.title: Say hi
social_messages.body: Groups feel warmer with you in the mix. Peek when you can.

social_messages.title: Your crew
social_messages.body: A quick scroll through Groups might spark your next session.

social_messages.title: Share if you like
social_messages.body: Even a tiny update can cheer someone on.

social_messages.title: Community warmth
social_messages.body: People are training nearby—in spirit. Check the board.

social_messages.title: Loosely connected
social_messages.body: No obligation—just vibes in Groups when you want them.

social_messages.title: Soft social
social_messages.body: If you're curious what friends logged, it's all in Groups.

social_messages.title: Belonging
social_messages.body: You're part of the grind—even on lurk days.

motivation_messages.title: UP.
motivation_messages.body: Coffee doesn't lift weights. You do. Move.

motivation_messages.title: Excuses = 0
motivation_messages.body: Discipline isn't negotiable today. Open the app.

motivation_messages.title: Clock's ticking
motivation_messages.body: Another day won't train itself. Start.

motivation_messages.title: Comfort is loud
motivation_messages.body: Gains stay quiet until you earn the noise. Work.

motivation_messages.title: No fluff
motivation_messages.body: Show up, log sets, leave nothing on the table.

motivation_messages.title: Standards
motivation_messages.body: Average is a choice. Choose different today.

motivation_messages.title: Execute
motivation_messages.body: Motivation is optional. Action isn't.

workout_messages.title: TRAIN
workout_messages.body: If you're not hurt, you're still negotiating. Open Leveld.

workout_messages.title: Session waiting
workout_messages.body: The bar doesn't care about your mood. Move it anyway.

workout_messages.title: Stop negotiating
workout_messages.body: Pick a workout and run it. That's the whole brief.

workout_messages.title: Weak default
workout_messages.body: Skip training and you're voting for who you were yesterday.

workout_messages.title: Input required
workout_messages.body: Sweat now, or explain later to your own standards.

workout_messages.title: Non-optional
workout_messages.body: You don't "try" to train—you train. Log it.

workout_messages.title: Go time
workout_messages.body: Four PM isn't a suggestion. It's a contract with yourself.

social_messages.title: Competition exists
social_messages.body: Someone just trained while you thought about it. Catch up.

social_messages.title: Leaderboards don't wait
social_messages.body: Groups tab. See the gap—then close it.

social_messages.title: Accountability
social_messages.body: Post progress or stay invisible. Both are statements.

social_messages.title: Eyes on standards
social_messages.body: Community rewards reps, not intentions. Log something.

social_messages.title: Not a fan club
social_messages.body: Groups are for work. Show yours.

social_messages.title: Rank is earned
social_messages.body: Scroll the feed after you've earned the scroll.

social_messages.title: Pressure is a privilege
social_messages.body: Someone in your group outworked you today. Respond.

motivation_messages.title: Quick audit
motivation_messages.body: Couch speedrun any%? Impressive. Gym's still an option.

motivation_messages.title: Allegedly
motivation_messages.body: You're "gonna go later." Leveld is ready when fiction becomes fact.

motivation_messages.title: Missing person
motivation_messages.body: Your future PR filed a report. Last seen: not the gym.

motivation_messages.title: Main character
motivation_messages.body: Or background NPC. Your call—sub-five minutes to decide.

motivation_messages.title: Plot twist
motivation_messages.body: Leg day didn't ghost you—you ghosted it. Rewrite the episode.

motivation_messages.title: Thermostat check
motivation_messages.body: If motivation is at zero, discipline is the patch. Install it.

motivation_messages.title: Performance review
motivation_messages.body: "Thought about training." Rating: needs improvement.

workout_messages.title: We've noticed
workout_messages.body: Thumb day isn't a split. Lift something heavier than the phone.

workout_messages.title: Schedule says
workout_messages.body: Train before the algorithm schedules your regret.

workout_messages.title: Touch grass
workout_messages.body: After squats. Order matters.

workout_messages.title: NPC idle
workout_messages.body: Default animation detected. Switch to Leveld workout mode.

workout_messages.title: Cope vs reps
workout_messages.body: One builds muscle. Open the app and pick wisely.

workout_messages.title: Bench the excuses
workout_messages.body: They're light. You can handle more weight than that.

workout_messages.title: Gym sub 5
workout_messages.body: Don't be a spectator. Go train—timer starts now.

social_messages.title: Social experiment
social_messages.body: Open Groups: who's training vs posting cope?

social_messages.title: Leaderboard lore
social_messages.body: Someone climbed while you scrolled. Rude. Revenge optional.

social_messages.title: FOMO loading
social_messages.body: Feed moved. You can lurk or participate—both are loud.

social_messages.title: Group chat energy
social_messages.body: Quiet in there. A flex post would help. Statistically.

social_messages.title: Sweat receipts
social_messages.body: The board keeps score even if your camera doesn't.

social_messages.title: Friendly rivalry
social_messages.body: Your friend didn't ask to be your villain arc. Still happened.

social_messages.title: Main feed
social_messages.body: Training posts hit different than "soon." Be the former.

motivation_messages.title: Easy does it
motivation_messages.body: When you feel like moving, Leveld's here—no rush.

motivation_messages.title: Low-key win
motivation_messages.body: Any small session beats a perfect plan you never start.

motivation_messages.title: Vibes check
motivation_messages.body: Go-day or rest-day—both can be valid. You pick.

motivation_messages.title: Optional hero arc
motivation_messages.body: Open the app without a speech. Just move a little.

motivation_messages.title: Soft launch
motivation_messages.body: If today's a training day, cool. If not, the app isn't judging.

motivation_messages.title: No manifesto
motivation_messages.body: Sometimes motivation is just "might as well." That counts.

motivation_messages.title: Float downstream
motivation_messages.body: When you're ready to row, Leveld has the oars.

workout_messages.title: Whenever
workout_messages.body: Want a session? It's in Leveld—streak guilt not included.

workout_messages.title: Chill session?
workout_messages.body: Light cardio, quick lift—log whatever you actually do.

workout_messages.title: No drama
workout_messages.body: Train like it's Tuesday. It might literally be Tuesday.

workout_messages.title: Low stakes PR
workout_messages.body: Progress doesn't need a spotlight—just a log entry.

workout_messages.title: If you want
workout_messages.body: Four PM is a suggestion. A good one, but still a suggestion.

workout_messages.title: Snack-sized workout
workout_messages.body: Short and done beats long and imaginary.

workout_messages.title: Easy mode
workout_messages.body: Open Leveld, tap something reasonable, close the loop.

social_messages.title: Casual peek
social_messages.body: Groups when you're curious—no pressure to perform.

social_messages.title: Scroll the feed
social_messages.body: Maybe you'll see something that makes you wanna move.

social_messages.title: Hang out
social_messages.body: Community's there if you want company on the grind.

social_messages.title: Lurk allowed
social_messages.body: You can watch the leaderboard without commenting. Still counts as showing up.

social_messages.title: Low-key connect
social_messages.body: Say hi if you feel like it. Ghosting the app is harder than ghosting texts.

social_messages.title: Soft FOMO
social_messages.body: Someone posted a workout. No stress—your turn can be later.

social_messages.title: Group aquarium
social_messages.body: Watch the fish swim. Jump in when the water feels right.
